characters.appearance: Young female, early 20s, slim build, fair complexion. She has straight blonde hair parted in the middle. Her facial features are symmetrical with a soft, smooth appearance.
Young female, mid 20s, average build, fair complexion. She has dark hair pulled back tightly into a bun or ponytail. She wears small hoop earrings.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, slightly anxious but eager to learn, using frequent hand gestures.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: We need to discuss about the budget. [We need to discuss about the budget.]
Character A says: Careful, correct English is "discuss the budget". [Careful, correct English is "discuss the budget".]
Character B says: OK, let's discuss the budget. [OK, let's discuss the budget.]
Character B says: I don't understand good this report. [I don't understand good this report.]
Character A says: Say "I don't understand this report well". [Say "I don't understand this report well".]
Character B says: I don't understand this report well. [I don't understand this report well.]
Character B says: सच बताऊँ, office में मुझसे रोज़ ऐसी गलतियाँ होती हैं। [Honestly, I make such mistakes every day at the office.]
Character B says: बाकी सब confident लगते हैं, और मुझे बहुत घबराहट होती है। [Everyone else seems confident, and I feel very nervous.]
Character A says: इसीलिए रोज़ speaking practice करना ज़रूरी है। [That's why doing daily speaking practice is important.]
Character B says: हाँ, पर tutors के लिए time और पैसे कहाँ हैं? [Yes, but where is the time and money for tutors?]
Character A says: तो मेरे साथ practice करो ना, तुम्हारी Supernova AI tutor! [Then practice with me, your Supernova AI tutor!]
Character A says: मैं हमेशा available हूँ, बिना judge किए तुम्हारी गलतियाँ सुधारने के लिए। [I am always available, to correct your mistakes without judging.]
Character B says: Job के लिए मुझे बस यही चाहिए था! [This is exactly what I needed for my job!]
Character A says: Supernova download करो और हम रोज़ practice करेंगे। [Download Supernova and we will practice every day.]
Character B says: OK, मैं आज ही Supernova download करती हूँ। [OK, I will download Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with relatable, common English mistakes made in a workplace setting.
- Highlights the emotional pain point of feeling nervous and insecure around confident colleagues.
- Introduces the Supernova AI tutor as an affordable, accessible, and non-judgmental solution for daily practice.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
